step_rationale: C-type lectin domain family 4 member E; myeloid C-type lectin driving innate immune recognition and myeloid activation.
mechanism: CLEC4E promotes monocyte and macrophage recruitment and activation in atherosclerotic plaques, driving inflammation and rupture susceptibility.

references.title: Identification of core genes shared by ischemic stroke and myocardial infarction using an integrated approach.
